items.name_en: Premium Original Leather M25087 White mini Capucines Series. The Capucines mini handbag was born in 2013, named after the Paris street where Louis Vuitton opened its first store in 1854. This Capucines mini handbag features full-grain Taurillon leather, blending multiple brand elements: leather-wrapped LV letters, a handle inspired by classic trunks, and a distinctive flap featuring Monogram flowers. With the shoulder strap, you can switch between hand and shoulder carry. Dimensions: 21 × 13.6 × 8 cm

items.name_en: SAUMUR BB Twin Star Series M46740 Uninspected Version #
items.name_cn:
SAUMUR BB Twin Star Series M46740 Uninspected Version #
❐ Size: 20*16*7.5cm ❐
The SAUMUR BB series has become a "must-have bag king". The classic monogram colorway is simple and retro. The aura of the Twin Star itself brings its own atmosphere, and the visual appeal is unexpectedly high-class!
Habitually free your hands; the strap is flexibly adjustable, and the capacity is impressive! One bag, multiple ways to carry, versatile for any season!
Trust me, this is a must-have; it has been a top-tier best-seller with consistent price premiums!

items.name_en: SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag【M14046】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
SIDE TRUNK Medium Handbag【M14046】White Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
This Side Trunk Sj medium handbag captures the playful spirit of the Murakami edition series with a whimsical Monogram pattern, incorporating reinforced metal corners and the iconic S-lock clasp into soft calfskin. It easily accommodates daily essentials. The square silhouette pays homage to the brand's classic trunks, with a detachable nail-studded handle and shoulder strap for flexible carrying.
Size: 23.5 x 16 x 8.5 cm.

items.name_en: Size 11*8*4cm
items.name_cn:
Size 11*8*4cm
This hard-to-get hot item PHONE BOX phone bag (M44914) was taken off the website as soon as it was released. To buy it, you must book it at the counter first. Our overseas channel stock is in. This L*V PHONE BOX bag has a delicate, retro, exquisite appearance, presenting the phone bag in a new BOX look, giving a full sense of freshness, a youthful look, and can be carried on the shoulder, making it completely fine to use as a general small bag for going out! It is enough to hold a large-screen phone body, so it became a hot model as soon as it was released! The upright design makes the compact body hold more than a general small bag!
